description: This file defines the Bootstrap Alert component, including its class, methods for closing and destroying alert elements, and integration with jQuery. It imports dependencies and sets up constants and plugin registration.

classes.name: Alert
classes.description: A class representing the Bootstrap alert component, extending BaseComponent, with methods to close and destroy alert elements, and static methods for jQuery integration.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Closes the alert by removing the show class and triggering the close event.

methods.name: _destroyElement
methods.description: Removes the alert element from the DOM and triggers the closed event.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Provides a jQuery plugin interface for the Alert component, allowing method calls via jQuery.
